interfaces.name: IncomeEntry
interfaces.signature: struct IncomeEntry: Identifiable, Codable, Hashable, Sendable { let id: UUID; var amount: Decimal; var receivedOn: Date; var note: String?; let createdAt: Date; var isCorrection: Bool { amount < 0 } }
interfaces.notes: FINAL. No updatedAt. receivedOn chosen over bare date for legibility against createdAt. isCorrection computed from sign, never stored. Same-date duplicates always distinct records, never merged.

interfaces.name: ObligationCadence
interfaces.signature: enum ObligationCadence: String, Codable, CaseIterable, Sendable { case weekly, monthly, quarterly, annual, oneOff }
interfaces.notes: Agreed across all rounds.

interfaces.name: Obligation
interfaces.signature: struct Obligation: Identifiable, Codable, Hashable, Sendable { let id: UUID; var name: String; var amount: Decimal; var cadence: ObligationCadence; var dueDate: Date; let createdAt: Date }
interfaces.notes: FINAL. No updatedAt/endDate/isActive. A one-off obligation past its dueDate simply stops producing occurrences in cadence expansion; stays visible until deleted. Amount always manual, engine never estimates it.

interfaces.name: ReserveSnapshot
interfaces.signature: struct ReserveSnapshot: Codable, Hashable, Sendable { var amount: Decimal; var lastUpdated: Date }
interfaces.notes: Single current value, never a ledger.

interfaces.name: BaselineStrategy
interfaces.signature: enum BaselineStrategy: Codable, Hashable, Sendable { case trailingLowPercentile(percentile: Int); case manualLowMonthEstimate }
interfaces.notes: Uncontested if PlanningConfig survives round 2.

interfaces.name: PlanningConfig
interfaces.signature: struct PlanningConfig: Codable, Hashable, Sendable { var lookbackMonths: Int; var lowConfidenceEntryThreshold: Int; var fullyComputedEntryThreshold: Int; var riskWindowDays: Int; var baselinePercentile: Int; var currencyCode: String?; static let standard = PlanningConfig(lookbackMonths: 12, lowConfidenceEntryThreshold: 2, fullyComputedEntryThreshold: 6, riskWindowDays: 14, baselinePercentile: 10, currencyCode: nil) }
interfaces.notes: FINAL. No BaselineStrategy enum. Compiled-in constants, never user-editable, never persisted.

interfaces.name: ConfidenceTier
interfaces.signature: enum ConfidenceTier: Codable, Hashable, Sendable { case insufficientData(manualFallback: Decimal?); case lowConfidenceComputed; case fullyComputed }
interfaces.notes: Screens switch on this directly. manualFallback now durably sourced from FinancialDocument.manualFallbackEstimate via PlanningEngine.evaluate's manualFallbackEstimate parameter.

interfaces.name: RiskWindowStatus
interfaces.signature: enum RiskWindowStatus: Codable, Hashable, Sendable { case clear; case upcomingObligation(daysUntilDue: Int, obligationIDs: [UUID]) }
interfaces.notes: 14-day threshold applied via PlanningConfig.

interfaces.name: RunwayStatus
interfaces.signature: enum RunwayStatus: Codable, Hashable, Sendable { case unavailable; case available(days: Int) }
interfaces.notes: Unavailable when reserve snapshot is missing.

interfaces.name: ExplanationLineItem
interfaces.signature: struct ExplanationLineItem: Identifiable, Codable, Hashable, Sendable { let id: UUID; var label: String; var amount: Decimal; var emphasis: ExplanationEmphasis }
interfaces.notes: Uncontested since round 1.

interfaces.name: ExplanationEmphasis
interfaces.signature: enum ExplanationEmphasis: String, Codable, Sendable { case normal, caution, result }
interfaces.notes: Uncontested.

interfaces.name: RibbonPoint
interfaces.signature: struct RibbonPoint: Codable, Hashable, Sendable { var monthStart: Date; var incomeTotal: Decimal }
interfaces.notes: Monthly bucket points for dashboard ribbon; zero-income months included explicitly.

interfaces.name: PlanningResult
interfaces.signature: struct PlanningResult: Codable, Hashable, Sendable { var asOf: Date; var safeToSpend: Decimal; var confidenceTier: ConfidenceTier; var baseline: Decimal; var obligationsDueThisCycle: Decimal; var runway: RunwayResult?; var riskWindowFlags: [RiskWindowFlag]; var monthlyIncomeBuckets: [MonthlyBucket]; var explanation: [ExplanationLineItem] }
interfaces.notes: Never floored at zero, never persisted.

interfaces.name: PlanningEngine
interfaces.signature: enum PlanningEngine { static func evaluate(income: [IncomeEntry], obligations: [Obligation], reserve: ReserveSnapshot?, manualFallbackEstimate: Decimal?, asOf: Date, config: PlanningConfig = .standard) -> PlanningResult }
interfaces.notes: FINAL. Concrete namespace, non-throwing, asOf always caller-supplied. manualFallbackEstimate parameter unchanged by the round-4 fix — the fix gave it a durable upstream source, not a new consumption shape.

interfaces.name: FinancialDocument
interfaces.signature: struct FinancialDocument: Codable, Sendable { var schemaVersion: Int; var incomeEntries: [IncomeEntry]; var obligations: [Obligation]; var reserve: ReserveSnapshot?; var manualFallbackEstimate: Decimal? }
interfaces.notes: FIXED per quality gate in round 4: manualFallbackEstimate now lives here (not AppSettings), since it's user-entered financial data that should survive relaunch and travel with export/import, same as reserve. The only thing export/import touches.

interfaces.name: AppSettings
interfaces.signature: struct AppSettings: Codable, Sendable { var schemaVersion: Int; var onboardingCompleted: Bool; var lockEnabled: Bool; var entitlementActive: Bool }
interfaces.notes: Never touched by import/export; corruption resets silently to defaults. Deliberately excludes manualFallbackEstimate.

interfaces.name: FinancialDocumentStore
interfaces.signature: protocol FinancialDocumentStore { func load() async throws -> FinancialDocument; func save(_ document: FinancialDocument) async throws }
interfaces.notes: Persistence-layer protocol, fakeable for tests. Atomic writes off the main actor.

interfaces.name: SettingsStore
interfaces.signature: protocol SettingsStore { func load() async throws -> AppSettings; func save(_ settings: AppSettings) async throws }
interfaces.notes: Decode failure treated by the caller as AppSettings defaults, never launch-blocking.

interfaces.name: ImportValidationError
interfaces.signature: enum ImportValidationError: Error, Sendable { case malformedJSON; case unsupportedSchemaVersion(found: Int); case invalidRecord(reason: String) }
interfaces.notes: Any case must leave the on-disk document byte-identical to its pre-import state. invalidRecord now also covers a negative manualFallbackEstimate.

interfaces.name: ImportExportService
interfaces.signature: protocol ImportExportService { func exportData(_ document: FinancialDocument) throws -> Data; func validateImport(_ data: Data) throws -> FinancialDocument }
interfaces.notes: Data-based for in-memory-fixture testability. Zero disk writes or store mutation inside this call. manualFallbackEstimate now round-trips correctly since it's part of FinancialDocument.

interfaces.name: AuthenticationOutcome
interfaces.signature: enum AuthenticationOutcome: Sendable { case success; case failedRetryable; case passcodeFallbackRequired; case unavailable }
interfaces.notes: Supports lock gate state machine without binding UI to LAContext.

interfaces.name: Authenticator
interfaces.signature: protocol Authenticator { func availability() -> AuthAvailability; func authenticate(reason: String) async -> AuthResult }
interfaces.notes: Canonical name aligned to the earlier architecture review; wraps LAContext for testability.

interfaces.name: EntitlementService
interfaces.signature: protocol EntitlementService { var isEntitled: Bool { get }; func setEntitled(_ value: Bool) }
interfaces.notes: Reads/writes AppSettingsStore.settings.entitlementActive; LockedFeatureRow binds only to this.

interfaces.name: CurrencyFormatting
interfaces.signature: protocol CurrencyFormatting { func string(from amount: Decimal, currencyCode: String?, locale: Locale) -> String }
interfaces.notes: Single formatting path, currencyCode nil defers to locale's currency.

interfaces.name: AppRootState
interfaces.signature: enum AppRootState: Sendable { case launching; case onboarding; case locked; case unlocked }
interfaces.notes: No root-level recoverable-error case — corrupted storage handled after unlock via financialStoreLoadError.

interfaces.name: DashboardViewState
interfaces.signature: enum DashboardViewState: Sendable { case loading; case insufficientData(PlanningResult); case ready(PlanningResult); case error(String) }
interfaces.notes: From Codex's proposal, uncontested so far.

interfaces.name: MoneyInputsViewState
interfaces.signature: enum MoneyInputsViewState: Sendable { case loading; case ready(document: FinancialDocument); case error(String) }
interfaces.notes: Contingent on the FinancialStore-vs-per-screen-state resolution — may need reshaping to read from the shared store instead of a raw document if that model wins.

interfaces.name: ExplanationHistoryViewState
interfaces.signature: enum ExplanationHistoryViewState: Sendable { case loading; case empty; case ready(PlanningResult, FinancialDocument); case error(String) }
interfaces.notes: Uncontested so far.

interfaces.name: SettingsViewState
interfaces.signature: enum SettingsViewState: Sendable { case loading; case ready(AppSettings); case error(String) }
interfaces.notes: Uncontested so far.

interfaces.name: recomputePlanningResult
interfaces.signature: func recomputePlanningResult(document: FinancialDocument, manualFallbackEstimate: Decimal?, asOf: Date, config: PlanningConfig) -> PlanningResult
interfaces.notes: Single helper path into PlanningEngine.evaluate. manualFallbackEstimate now consistently sourced from document.manualFallbackEstimate.

interfaces.name: validateFinancialDocument
interfaces.signature: func validateFinancialDocument(_ document: FinancialDocument) throws
interfaces.notes: Shared domain validation for import and post-decode load checks. Now also rejects a negative manualFallbackEstimate as ImportValidationError.invalidRecord — unlike IncomeEntry.amount, a negative value here has no sensible meaning.

interfaces.name: MonthlyBucket
interfaces.signature: struct MonthlyBucket: Codable, Hashable, Sendable { var monthStart: Date; var totalIncome: Decimal }
interfaces.notes: Zero-income months present with totalIncome == 0, never omitted.

interfaces.name: RiskWindowFlag
interfaces.signature: struct RiskWindowFlag: Identifiable, Codable, Hashable, Sendable { var id: UUID { obligationID }; var obligationID: UUID; var obligationName: String; var amount: Decimal; var dueInDays: Int }
interfaces.notes: FINAL. Array-of-flags — multiple simultaneous obligations stay distinguishable. Empty array = clear.

interfaces.name: RunwayResult
interfaces.signature: struct RunwayResult: Codable, Hashable, Sendable { var monthsOfRunway: Decimal; var basedOnReserveAmount: Decimal; var reserveLastUpdated: Date }
interfaces.notes: Nil on PlanningResult when reserve is missing.

interfaces.name: PlanningEngine.evaluate
interfaces.signature: enum PlanningEngine { static func evaluate(income: [IncomeEntry], obligations: [Obligation], reserve: ReserveSnapshot?, asOf: Date) -> PlanningResult }
interfaces.notes: pure, synchronous, zero side effects, asOf always explicit — never defaults to Date(). Risk window threshold is a fixed 14-day constant inside this function.

interfaces.name: FinancialStore
interfaces.signature: @MainActor @Observable final class FinancialStore { private(set) var incomeEntries: [IncomeEntry]; private(set) var obligations: [Obligation]; private(set) var reserve: ReserveSnapshot?; private(set) var manualFallbackEstimate: Decimal?; private(set) var planningResult: PlanningResult; init(document: FinancialDocument, config: PlanningConfig = .standard, asOf: Date); func addIncome(_ entry: IncomeEntry, asOf: Date); func updateIncome(_ entry: IncomeEntry, asOf: Date); func deleteIncome(id: UUID, asOf: Date); func addObligation(_ o: Obligation, asOf: Date); func updateObligation(_ o: Obligation, asOf: Date); func deleteObligation(id: UUID, asOf: Date); func updateReserve(amount: Decimal, asOf: Date); func updateManualFallbackEstimate(_ value: Decimal?, asOf: Date); func replaceAll(with document: FinancialDocument, asOf: Date); func snapshotDocument() -> FinancialDocument }
interfaces.notes: FIXED: init hydrates manualFallbackEstimate from document.manualFallbackEstimate instead of defaulting to nil every launch; snapshotDocument() must include the current value in its returned FinancialDocument or export/import reintroduces the same data-loss bug through a different door. Concrete class, not protocol (only one real implementation; protocol existentials risk degrading @Observable's fine-grained tracking; @Environment(Type.self) is documented against concrete types). Explicit per-call asOf on every mutator. Single shared instance owned by AppRootCoordinator, injected via environment only once fully populated — no per-screen copies of these arrays.

interfaces.name: AppSettingsStore
interfaces.signature: @MainActor @Observable final class AppSettingsStore { private(set) var settings: AppSettings; func setLockEnabled(_ v: Bool); func setEntitlementActive(_ v: Bool); func setOnboardingCompleted(_ v: Bool) }
interfaces.notes: Loaded before FinancialStore since root-phase determination depends on it.

interfaces.name: FinancialDocumentStoring
interfaces.signature: protocol FinancialDocumentStoring { func load() async throws -> FinancialDocument; func save(_ document: FinancialDocument) async throws }
interfaces.notes: Concrete implementation performs atomic temp-write-then-replace off the main actor.

interfaces.name: AppSettingsStoring
interfaces.signature: protocol AppSettingsStoring { func load() async throws -> AppSettings; func save(_ settings: AppSettings) async throws }
interfaces.notes: Decode failure is handled by caller as AppSettings.default, not surfaced as fatal launch failure.

interfaces.name: AuthenticatorProtocol
interfaces.signature: protocol AuthenticatorProtocol { func availability() -> AuthAvailability; func authenticate(reason: String) async -> AuthResult }
interfaces.notes: FINAL name, matching the ios_architecture_review lock. Wraps LAContext for testability without hardware.

interfaces.name: AuthAvailability
interfaces.signature: enum AuthAvailability: Sendable { case biometric; case passcodeOnly; case unavailable }
interfaces.notes: .unavailable falls through to unlocked-with-notice, never a dead end.

interfaces.name: AuthResult
interfaces.signature: enum AuthResult: Sendable { case success; case failure(retryable: Bool); case userCancelled }
interfaces.notes: Agreed.

interfaces.name: EntitlementServicing
interfaces.signature: protocol EntitlementServicing { var isEntitled: Bool { get }; func setEntitled(_ value: Bool) }
interfaces.notes: Backed by AppSettingsStore entitlementActive for MVP. Premium UI binds only through this abstraction.

interfaces.name: ImportExportServicing
interfaces.signature: protocol ImportExportServicing { func exportData(_ document: FinancialDocument) throws -> Data; func validateImport(_ data: Data) throws -> FinancialDocument }
interfaces.notes: Validation is in-memory only. Caller confirms replace with the user, then persists the validated document separately.

interfaces.name: AppRootCoordinator
interfaces.signature: @MainActor @Observable final class AppRootCoordinator { private(set) var phase: AppRootState; private(set) var financialStore: FinancialStore?; private(set) var settingsStore: AppSettingsStore?; private(set) var financialStoreLoadError: Error?; func bootstrap() async; func beginUnlock() async; func handleScenePhaseChange(_ newPhase: ScenePhase) }
interfaces.notes: financialStore stays nil/undecoded until authentication succeeds. Document load starts only once unlock is user-initiated, concurrently with authenticate(); discarded if auth fails/cancelled. Corrupted document sets financialStoreLoadError, phase still becomes .unlocked.

interfaces.name: SnapshotRedactionModifier
interfaces.signature: extension View { func redactedOnInactive(_ isInactive: Bool) -> some View }
interfaces.notes: Swaps to a branded placeholder on scenePhase == .inactive before the system app-switcher snapshot; manual QA checklist item, not an automated test.

interfaces.name: DashboardViewModel
interfaces.signature: @MainActor protocol DashboardViewModel: AnyObject { var isQuickAddPresented: Bool { get set }; func presentQuickAdd(); func dismissQuickAdd() }
interfaces.notes: Presentation state only — reads live planning data from the shared FinancialStore.

interfaces.name: MoneyInputsViewModel
interfaces.signature: @MainActor protocol MoneyInputsViewModel: AnyObject { var editingIncomeID: UUID? { get set }; var editingObligationID: UUID? { get set }; var isReserveEditorPresented: Bool { get set } }
interfaces.notes: Presentation state only. The manual-fallback-estimate editor also writes through FinancialStore.updateManualFallbackEstimate, never a local copy.

interfaces.name: ExplanationHistoryViewModel
interfaces.signature: @MainActor protocol ExplanationHistoryViewModel: AnyObject { var selectedHistoryFilter: String? { get set } }
interfaces.notes: Presentation state only; data read from PlanningResult and FinancialStore directly.

interfaces.name: SettingsViewModel
interfaces.signature: @MainActor protocol SettingsViewModel: AnyObject { var importErrorMessage: String? { get set }; var exportSucceeded: Bool { get set } }
interfaces.notes: Presentation state only; persisted values remain in shared stores/services.

interfaces.name: ImportFlowState
interfaces.signature: enum ImportFlowState: Sendable { case idle; case validating; case confirmingReplace(FinancialDocument); case success; case failure(ImportValidationError) }
interfaces.notes: Sole surviving screen-state enum, scoped to Settings' import feature.
